steps.title: Spot the consequence
steps.content: The first sentence describes an action—stitching together cultural symbols—while the second describes its consequence: blurring the line between art and craft. The transition must show this cause-effect link.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
“In so doing” means “by doing that”—expressing that the blurring results from the combining.
The other choices signal contrast, exemplification, or emphasis rather than causality.
That matches Choice B — In so doing,.
